title: Machanayim #4266
definition:
Mahanaim = "two camps"

 1) a place east of the Jordan, named from Jacob's encounter with angels
 2) a Levitical city in Gad
nasbUsage:
Definition: Mahanaim = "two camps"

 1) a place east of the Jordan, named from Jacob's encounter with angels
 2) a Levitical city in Gad

    NASB:  two camps, a place E. of the Jordan
